verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, in adjutorium meum intende ;  Domine, ad adjuvandum me festina.
verses.king_james: Make haste, O God, to deliver me; make haste to help me, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur, et revereantur, qui quærunt animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵבֹ֣שׁוּ וְיַחְפְּרוּ֮ מְבַקְשֵׁ֢י נַ֫פְשִׁ֥י יִסֹּ֣גוּ אָ֭חוֹר וְיִכָּלְמ֑וּ חֲ֝פֵצֵ֗י רָעָתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Let them be ashamed and confounded that seek after my soul: let them be turned backward, and put to confusion, that desire my hurt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Avertantur retrorsum, et erubescant, qui volunt mihi mala ;  avertantur statim erubescentes qui dicunt mihi : Euge, euge !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֭שׁוּבוּ עַל־עֵ֣קֶב בׇּשְׁתָּ֑ם הָ֝אֹמְרִ֗ים הֶ֘אָ֥ח ׀ הֶאָֽח׃
verses.king_james: Let them be turned back for a reward of their shame that say, Aha, aha.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsultent et lætentur in te omnes qui quærunt te ;  et dicant semper : Magnificetur Dominus, qui diligunt salutare tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֘שִׂ֤ישׂוּ וְיִשְׂמְח֨וּ ׀ בְּךָ֗ כׇּֽל־מְבַ֫קְשֶׁ֥יךָ וְיֹאמְר֣וּ תָ֭מִיד יִגְדַּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֹ֝הֲבֵ֗י יְשׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Let all those that seek thee rejoice and be glad in thee: and let such as love thy salvation say continually, Let God be magnified.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego vero egenus et pauper sum ;  Deus, adjuva me.  Adjutor meus et liberator meus es tu ;  Domine, ne moreris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י ׀ עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְיוֹן֮ אֱלֹהִ֢ים ח֫וּשָׁה־לִּ֥י עֶזְרִ֣י וּמְפַלְטִ֣י אַ֑תָּה יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה אַל־תְּאַחַֽר׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: But I am poor and needy: make haste unto me, O God: thou art my help and my deliverer; O Lord, make no tarrying.
